subject: ARM: OMAP2+: pm33xx-core: fix device node reference leaks in amx3_idle_init
notes: Reused stable POC, features.json, seed.c, and poc-db from lin-1-rep1 (POC sha256 locked, chmod 444).

Regenerated plan/predicates/final.ql for rep5 variance: switched from rep1's getAcquiredVariable+hasMatchingOfNodePut split to acquiredInto (with Initializer-or-AssignExpr) + releasedSomewhere + inBuggyTagFunction; regex-based acquire-API enumeration.
All 5 predicates passed POC test queries first try (state_node found, of_node_put absent).
Final query compiled and executed on poc-db: exactly 1 alert on amx3_idle_init_buggy/of_parse_phandle; no fixed/fp matches.
